# Laravel Forge MCP

> A native Laravel MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that exposes Laravel
> Forge management as MCP tools. It wraps the official `laravel/forge-sdk`
> (v4, Forge API v2) and is a Composer-installable replacement for the Node
> `@bretterer/forge-mcp-server` package.

Package: `isapp/laravel-forge-mcp` (Composer, MIT). Requires PHP 8.2+ and
Laravel 12 or 13. Registers a local (stdio) MCP server named `forge`,
started with `php artisan mcp:start forge`.

## Configuration

Reuses the standard `laravel/forge-sdk` config in `config/services.php`:

```php
'forge' => [
    'token' => env('FORGE_API_TOKEN'),
    'organization' => env('FORGE_ORG_SLUG'), // optional; auto-resolved when omitted
],
```

Forge API v2 scopes every server/site call to an organization. When the slug is
not configured it is resolved automatically: one organization is used and
cached; multiple organizations require `FORGE_ORG_SLUG` to be set, or an
`organizationSlug` argument per tool call.

## Tools

- list_servers — list all servers in the organization
- get_server — get a server by ID
- list_sites — list sites on a server
- get_site — get a site by ID
- deploy_site — trigger a deployment
- get_deployments — deployment history for a site
- get_deployment — a single deployment, including status
- get_deployment_log — output log for a deployment (diagnose failures)
- get_deployment_script — get the deployment script
- update_deployment_script — update the deployment script
- toggle_quick_deploy — enable/disable quick deploy (push-to-deploy)
- reboot_server — reboot a server

Every tool accepts an optional `organizationSlug` argument.

## Notes

- Built on Forge API v2 (`/orgs/{slug}/...`). The Forge API v1 endpoints
  `server load` and `reset deployment state` do not exist in v2 and are
  intentionally absent.
- Source: src/Tools/ (one class per tool), src/Servers/ForgeServer.php,
  src/Support/OrganizationResolver.php.

## Links

- README: README.md
- Agent/contributor guide: AGENTS.md
- Laravel MCP: https://github.com/laravel/mcp
- Laravel Forge SDK: https://github.com/laravel/forge-sdk
